title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, March 14 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 14/03/2023
Image reference: 2023-03-14_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-march-14-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Bulker values have firmed
Panamax Xin Hong (82,200 DWT, Oct 2013, Dalian Shipbuilding Industry Corp) sold to Capital Ship Management for USD 20.50 mil, VV Value USD 21.68 mil - BWTS. Panamax Magic Rainbow (73,600 DWT, Jan 2007, Jiangnan Shanghai Changxing HI) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 12.60 mil, VV Value USD 12.34 mil - BWTS. Supramax IVS Pinehurst (57,800 DWT, Jul 2015, Tsuneishi Cebu) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 23.25 mil, VV Value USD 22.02 mil - BWTS.
